problem id: ced947c8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  00000111 -> 00001000
  00011101 -> 00101000
  11001100 -> 00100110
  01110011 -> 10001011
  11000011 -> 00001110
  01110010 -> 10010011
  10001111 -> 00001100
  10111001 -> 01001101
  10001000 -> 01000100
  00111111 -> 00001001

query: 01101011
predicted answer: 01001011
